sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71194" key="nuktidie/codos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ-διέξοδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of stars, <sense id="n71194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rising above the horizon after sunset and setting below it before sunrise</tr_> (so that their whole course above the horizon is visible), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Phas.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">pp.9,10</biblScope> </bibl> H.: wrongly expld. by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:14:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.12</biblScope> </bibl> of stars <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">setting before sunset and rising after sunrise.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
